text:

Sunpoet Po-Chuan Hsieh wrote: 

Hi dinoex@, 

Putting the icons in pkg-plist is correct. 
There's no deinstallation of INSTALL_ICONS in bsd.gnome.mk. 
Please remove INSTALL_ICONS and put the icons back to pkg-plist. 
Thanks. 

Best regards, 
Sunpoet
